description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a modern, urban appearance. The individual wears a sleeveless, knee-length dress featuring a bold checkered pattern, cinched at the waist with a wide belt. The figure is accessorized with large, round sunglasses and tall, slouchy boots with high heels, adding a fashionable flair. The arms are relaxed and slightly bent, and the hands are open and natural. The hairstyle is medium-length and textured, with the hair pulled back and partially secured. The overall look is trendy and distinctive, suitable for a contemporary city environment.
description: A fashionable adult pedestrian in a checkered dress, wide belt, tall boots, and sunglasses, with a modern hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the checkered dress, wide belt, sunglasses, and tall boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the boots, belt, and the layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the hairstyle, and the boots' structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm position, dress profile, and boot details.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length dress with a wide belt and tall heeled boots, accessorized with large sunglasses
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length textured hair pulled back and partially secured
